title: config.example.json: add missing agent_presets field
action: Add the agent_presets array to config.example.json (repo root), matching the same three entries (Claude, Codex, Agy) that config::default_config_json emits (per D7). Keep every other field exactly as-is, including the intentionally-different placeholder values (herdr_session: "gateway", allowed_roots: ["/home/CHANGE_ME/projects"]) -- this is a documentation sample meant to show the full field set for users to customize, not a byte-identical copy of the canonical default.

truths: config.example.json is valid JSON and includes an agent_presets array with the Claude/Codex/Agy entries

artifacts.substantive: contains agent_presets alongside all pre-existing fields

prohibitions: herdr_session and allowed_roots keep their existing placeholder values (gateway / CHANGE_ME) -- not replaced with the live defaults

verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('config.example.json')); assert 'agent_presets' in d and len(d['agent_presets']) == 3, d; assert d['herdr_session'] == 'gateway'"

trace.outcome: Added agent_presets array to config.example.json, matching the 3 canonical entries (Claude, Codex, Agy) from config::default_config_json, with placeholder values preserved (herdr_session: gateway, allowed_roots: /home/CHANGE_ME/projects)
trace.verify_output: Verification passed: agent_presets array present with 3 entries, herdr_session unchanged.
trace.verify_command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('config.example.json')); assert 'agent_presets' in d and len(d['agent_presets']) == 3, d; assert d['herdr_session'] == 'gateway'"
